sourceRefs: DRAFT — c1.2 technique unit, the heaviest DALF writing genre. Covers sujet → problématique (two defensible answers), the dialectical plan (thèse / antithèse without strawmen / synthèse as dépassement not compromise), the introduction's three gestures, trancher-then-open conclusions, and rigour over eloquence — with a grader's comment sheet as the reading. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 7 'Échanges' ('Techniques pour faire une dissertation'). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
